_comment: Deterministic time formulas per process. Constants sourced from Machinery's Handbook and vendor spec sheets.
_calibration: Tune against real Schneider PO data when available.

LASER_CUT.description: Time based on cut perimeter and pierce count per material+thickness

WATERJET.description: Slower than laser; handles thick plate and hard materials

TUBE_LASER.description: Linear cutting length along tube profile

PRESS_BRAKE.description: Time per bend including positioning and stroke. Setup covers tool selection and first-piece setup.

TAP.description: Time per tapped hole. Assumes standard machine tapping.

DRILL.description: Drill press time per hole. Use for simple through/blind holes ≤ 0.5" dia with no tight tolerance callout. Cheaper than CNC mill.

CNC_MILL.description: Time per milled feature — pockets, slots, contours, counterbores, countersinks, holes >0.5" dia, or any hole with tight tolerance. Setup covers program load and fixturing.

LATHE.description: Time per turned feature. Setup covers chuck and tool setup.

WELD_MIG.description: MIG weld time per inch of weld bead. Use for carbon steel. Faster and cheaper than TIG. cut_length_in = total weld bead length in inches.

WELD_TIG.description: TIG weld time per inch of weld bead. Use for stainless, aluminum, or when drawing specifies TIG. cut_length_in = total weld bead length in inches.

PAINT.description: Tiered by blank area (proxy for surface area). Includes prep, prime, topcoat.

POWDER_COAT.description: Tiered by blank area. Includes rack, coat, cure, rack-off.

ANODIZE.description: Aluminum only. Tiered by blank area. Includes rack, tank time, seal, rack-off.
